The '''Scurrg H-6 Bomber''' was a [[bomber]] utilized by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. [[Malee Hurra]] once [[pilot]]ed one.<ref name="Armada" />

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The Scurgg H-6 was introduced into [[canon]] in the miniatures game [[Star Wars: Armada|''Star Wars'': Armada]].<ref name="Armada" /> It originated in ''[[Star Wars Legends]]'' in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: Starfighter (video game)|''Star Wars: Starfighter'']].<ref name="SWS">[[Star Wars: Starfighter (video game)|''Star Wars: Starfighter'']]</ref>
